query: Oregon Winterfest Nordic cross country ski race Bend

videos.title: Bend Winterfest 2011
videos.description:
http://www.jasonbrownleedesign.com
Bend Winterfest is a weekend long event that offers live music performances (this year featuring headliners Lyrics Born, and The Aggrolites), ski and snowboard rail jams, nordic skiing sprint races, food & vendor area, beer gardens, ice carving, snow sculptures, OMSI, Metal Mulisha Moto Show and more! More info:

bendwinterfest.com

videos.title: 2016 Oregon Winterfest: Fun For The Whole Family!
Skate skiing at Meisner
videos.description: Keith through the woods just outside of Bend, OR

videos.title: Cowbell: Olympic gold Medalist Jessie Diggins Minnesota World Cup Commercial
videos.description:
The 2020 Coop FIS Cross-Country Skiing World Cup Sprint Finals on March 17th will mark the first time in two decades that the world’s best have competed in American snow! The race will cap off the March 14-17 Fastenal Parallel 45 Winter Festival, which will include live music, craft beer, citizen races, and more. Mark your calendars and meet us at The Trailhead for this historic event. For more information and to buy tickets, visit www.mnworldcup.com.

Video by Pocket Hercules.

videos.title: 2012 Mt. Bachelor Winter Carnival
videos.description: View the scenes of dog skijoling, snowmobile drag races, snowshoeing, equipment demos and fun at Mt. Bachelor's first Winter Carnival! Filmed and edited by HP.

videos.title: NWT Territorial Cross Country Ski Trials
videos.description:
NWT Territorial Ski Trials for the Whitehorse 2012 Arctic Winter Games.  Trials were held at the Yellowknife Ski Club on December 9-10, 2011, attracting 28 skiers from across the territory.
Footage is from the second day of races, where the Midgets, Juveniles and Juniors all raced a 5-K freestyle distance.

videos.title: Overnight Cross-Country Ski Adventures In Three Sisters Wilderness
videos.description:
A series of huts offer overnight lodging in the Three Sisters mountains of Central Oregon. Backcountry experience isn’t necessary to enjoy a multi-day, cross-country adventure.

Full story here:
https://www.opb.org/news/article/three-sisters-backcountry-ski-huts/

videos.title: Cross-country skiing in Downtown Portland
videos.description: Portland, Oregon's funky spirit is on display during the Stumptown Birkebeiner- an impromptu weather-triggered version of an 800 year old Norwegian cross-country ski race. Whenever a good snow storm is predicted for Portland, Win Goodboddy and his friends put the word out : if snow covers the streets, it's time for anyone and everyone to meet at Powell's books (at 9am!) for a ski race through the streets of northwest Portland. This story is from Oregon Field Guide on Oregon Public Broadcasting.
